title: Rosalie Minnitt Clementine 2 0 Work In Progress
description: Miss Lady Clementine is BACK (due to unpopular demand!). She's off to The Big City. But soft - revolution’s in the air. Will our fearless heroine keep her wits or lose her head entirely? Guardian's Top Ten Comedy of 2023, Telegraph’s Funniest Shows at the Fringe and one of the British Comedy Guide’s Top Reviewed Shows.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
